rule_metadata.name: ssh_auditor
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'ssh-auditor' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule ssh_auditor
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'ssh-auditor' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "ssh-auditor"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "ssh-auditor" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
